author: Claude Code
content:
Implementation complete.

Changes:
- `server.ts`: Added `related` to `createIssue()`, `updateIssue()` allowed fields, and `issueToIndexEntry()` (defaults to `[]` for old issues). Index now rebuilds on every startup.
- `.project/server.ts`: Same changes, plus `listIssues()` defaults `related` to `[]`.
- `ui/js/views/detail.js`: Added "Related Issues" section with clickable links. Bidirectional — automatically shows reverse links (if A links to B, B also shows A).
- `CLAUDE.md`: Updated issue.json format docs.
- Synced to template and `.project/ui/`.
- Retroactively linked PROJ-rp-5 → PROJ-4.
